Name: Greater Valkyrate
Description: Incensed at the expulsion of her lover, Redjack Ryan, Maria Morgraine broke away from the Oberon Confederation with some loyal followers. They settled on the frozen world Götterdämmerung and declared it the capital of their new pirate kingdom. Morgraine's Valkyrate is known for its emphasis on female dominance.
ReputationStatements: You've been given an opportunity to be useful, scum. Take it.
Do not mistake this contract for respect, mercenary. We have a task requiring action and money to waste.
The weak make excuses. The strong make results. We'll soon discover which you are.
The old raider kings took what they wanted. We honor tradition here.
Every frontier world eventually learns the same lesson: someone stronger always exists.
Ahh, you're back for more? The Valkyrate always has someone to kill.
The warriors speak well of your company - you've earned a name worth remembering.
MissionSuccessStatements: Ha! That's how it's done. The frontier remains dangerous. More dangerous for them than for us.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Not the victory we expected, but you bled with honor. I can respect that.
BadFaithFailureStatements: A Valkyr would rather fall in battle than abandon it. You chose shamefully.
